title: crotalaria occidentalis
intro: Crotalaria occidentalis, also known as Western rattlebox, is a tropical legume plant native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Crotalaria occidentalis has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, thanks to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various forms of administration, including oral consumption and topical application.
